tooling_sandboxing.detail: Custom Function/Tool nodes execute JavaScript inside NodeVM, "an isolated V8 context with a custom module loader that enforces dependency and built-in module allowlists"; built-in modules, external packages, and filesystem access are all denied by default unless explicitly whitelisted via TOOL_FUNCTION_BUILTIN_DEP/TOOL_FUNCTION_EXTERNAL_DEP/ALLOW_BUILTIN_DEP.

context_memory.detail: Chat memory nodes persist conversation history in the chat_message database table (or external Redis/DynamoDB/MongoDB Atlas/Zep backends) keyed by a sessionId, surviving app restarts rather than living only in the request.

lifecycle_hooks.detail: Simple Prompt Moderation uses an LLM to check a user query against a deny list and, on a match, outputs a default error message instead of forwarding it, preventing the problematic input from ever reaching the primary LLM/tool call.

prompt_optimization.detail: Chat Prompt Template nodes expose editable system/human messages with prompt-value variables, and overrideConfig.systemMessagePrompt lets callers override the system message per API call; no automatic prompt-tuning loop is documented.

build_vs_buy.label: blueprint
build_vs_buy.detail: Repo installs the self-hostable, config/flow-driven LangChain UI (deployable to AWS/Azure/GCP/DO); Flowise Cloud is a named managed hosting alternative, not the primary installed artifact.
